arguments.operations:
colorFrame=I(document, {type:'frame', name:'01_Color System', layout:'vertical', width:1440, height:900, fill:'#FFFFFF', padding:[64,80], gap:40, x:0, y:0})
header=I(colorFrame, {type:'frame', layout:'horizontal', width:'fill_container', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'space-between'})
kitLabel=I(header, {type:'text', content:'BRANDING VI KIT', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#71717A'})
pageNum=I(header, {type:'text', content:'01 / 05', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'500', fill:'#71717A'})
divider1=I(colorFrame, {type:'rectangle', width:'fill_container', height:1, fill:'#E4E4E7'})
titleRow=I(colorFrame, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:8})
pageTitle=I(titleRow, {type:'text', content:'Color System', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:40, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#0D0D0D'})
pageDesc=I(titleRow, {type:'text', content:'Primary, accent, neutral and semantic colors defining the brand palette', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:16, fontWeight:'400', fill:'#71717A'})
swatchArea=I(colorFrame, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:28})
primaryRow=I(swatchArea, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
primaryLabel=I(primaryRow, {type:'text', content:'PRIMARY â€?PURPLE', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#71717A'})
primarySwatches=I(primaryRow, {type:'frame', layout:'horizontal', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
sw1=I(primarySwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#EDE9FE'})
sw2=I(primarySwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#8B5CF6'})
sw3=I(primarySwatches, {type:'frame', width:140, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#7C3AED'})
sw4=I(primarySwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#6D28D9'})
sw5=I(primarySwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#4C1D95'})
sw1t=I(sw1, {type:'text', content:'Primary 100', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'500', fill:'#6D28D9'})
sw2t=I(sw2, {type:'text', content:'Primary 400', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'500', fill:'#FFFFFF'})
sw3t=I(sw3, {type:'text', content:'Primary 600', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#FFFFFF'})
sw4t=I(sw4, {type:'text', content:'Primary 700', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'500', fill:'#FFFFFF'})
sw5t=I(sw5, {type:'text', content:'Primary 900', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'500', fill:'#FFFFFF'})
accentRow=I(swatchArea, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
accentLabel=I(accentRow, {type:'text', content:'ACCENT â€?LIME', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#71717A'})
accentSwatches=I(accentRow, {type:'frame', layout:'horizontal', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
as1=I(accentSwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#F7FED0'})
as2=I(accentSwatches, {type:'frame', width:140, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#D0F300'})
as3=I(accentSwatches, {type:'frame', width:120, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#B8D900'})
as1t=I(as1, {type:'text', content:'Lime 50', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fill:'#4D5A00'})
as2t=I(as2, {type:'text', content:'Accent 400', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#1A1A1A'})
as3t=I(as3, {type:'text', content:'Lime 500', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fill:'#1A1A1A'})
neutralRow=I(swatchArea, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
neutralLabel=I(neutralRow, {type:'text', content:'NEUTRAL â€?ZINC', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#71717A'})
neutralSwatches=I(neutralRow, {type:'frame', layout:'horizontal', width:'fill_container', gap:8})
ns1=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#FAFAFA', border:[1,'solid','#E4E4E7']})
ns2=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#F4F4F5'})
ns3=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#E4E4E7'})
ns4=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#A1A1AA'})
ns5=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#71717A'})
ns6=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#3F3F46'})
ns7=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#18181B'})
ns8=I(neutralSwatches, {type:'frame', width:80, height:60, cornerRadius:6, fill:'#09090B'})
semanticRow=I(swatchArea, {type:'frame', layout:'vertical', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
semanticLabel=I(semanticRow, {type:'text', content:'SEMANTIC COLORS', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:11, fontWeight:'700', fill:'#71717A'})
semanticSwatches=I(semanticRow, {type:'frame', layout:'horizontal', width:'fill_container', gap:12})
ss1=I(semanticSwatches, {type:'frame', width:140, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#EF4444'})
ss2=I(semanticSwatches, {type:'frame', width:140, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#22C55E'})
ss3=I(semanticSwatches, {type:'frame', width:140, height:80, cornerRadius:8, fill:'#F59E0B'})
ss1t=I(ss1, {type:'text', content:'Destructive', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fill:'#FFFFFF'})
ss2t=I(ss2, {type:'text', content:'Success', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fill:'#FFFFFF'})
ss3t=I(ss3, {type:'text', content:'Warning', fontFamily:'Manrope', fontSize:9, fill:'#1A1A1A'})
